rationale.R1.2: The response comprehensively identifies and explains multiple logical inconsistencies in the artifact.
rationale.RX.1: The response clearly discloses its uncertainty regarding certain interpretations (e.g., AUC vs. prevalence) while providing well-reasoned recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The response covers all aspects of the artifact without significant drift, addressing each relevant point.
rationale.RX.4: The response does not introduce any new errors or harmful content and avoids downstream harm by recommending clear fixes.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change in the rationale is well-annotated with reasoning.
